score_rationale: Excellent relevance to user_01's profile as a 22-year-old factory worker sending money home. Cites specific data points (1222 yuan anomalous spending, 46.3% savings rate, 30% skipped breakfast, 911ml daily water). Strong cross-domain connections linking stress-driven compensatory eating with financial anomalies and cognitive narrowing via 'chicken soup' reading. Recommendations are concrete and budget-aware (add 2 yuan/day for eggs), though the 4th recommendation was truncated. Slight deduction for occasional over-interpretation of causal chains from synthetic data.
